'''Garnoo''' was an ancient and long-lived [[Neti/Legends|Neti]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. They had an illustrious career among the Jedi, working to defend what the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Order]] believed in and training many  [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] to carry on that tradition, even until the preceding years before the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] began.

One of their most famous [[Padawan/Legends|apprentices]] was [[Oss Wilum]], a participant in the infamous [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], though Oss had just begun his [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] when Garnoo realized their time was coming to an end. To make sure Oss' training was seen through to the finish, Garnoo asked [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master [[Thon]] if he would take Oss on as his student. When Garnoo's life finally did come to an end, Thon respected the wishes of his old friend and, seeing great potential in Oss, accepted him as his Padawan.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]] {{1stm}}
